title: DrDonut 16x
description: Shazu Donut PvP is a pure vanilla‑style Minecraft texture pack optimized for competitive PvP. It enhances clarity, sharpens visuals, and keeps the classic aesthetic intact, offering lightweight
body:
# 🍩 Dr Donut PvP Texture Pack 🎮

✨ A sweet blend of style and performance for PvP battles!  

- ⚔️ Smooth Combat – Crisp sword textures for cleaner duels  
- 🎯 Clear Visibility – Simplified particles & sharp icons for better focus  
- 🍩 Donut Theme – Fun, unique visuals that stand out from the crowd  
- ⚡ FPS Boost – Lightweight design for faster gameplay  
- 🌈 Vibrant Colors – Eye-catching palettes that make PvP more exciting  
- 🔊 Immersive Feel – Custom sounds for a satisfying hit feedback
